name: Sent on an errand of trust

props.ChoiceTitle: Sent on an errand of trust
props.ChoiceText: A sealed errand taught you that some servants rise because they carry what others are afraid to write twice.
props.ChoiceBio: An errand of trust taught you that reliability is a form of rank in any great house.

0.TargetText: Someone of rank now remembers you as dependable under discretion.
0.TransitionText: Because an errand of trust taught you that reliability is a form of rank in any great house, household authority remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Steward, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because an errand of trust taught you that reliability is a form of rank in any great house, household authority remained your daily craft.

0.TargetText: A courier, clerk, or chamber servant still believes you can be trusted with delicate matters.
